revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Nagano Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map templates]] to [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map modules]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
revision.text:
{{Module:Location map/data/doc|image=[[File:Nagano géolocalisation.svg|thumb|250px|Map of Nagano Prefecture]] |examples= === Location map, using default map (image) === {{Location map | Japan Nagano Prefecture | width = 200 | lat_deg = 36.579722 | lon_deg = 138.165556 | label = Nagano Olympic Stadium }} 
{{Location map | Japan Nagano Prefecture
| width   = 200
| lat_deg = 36.579722
| lon_deg = 138.165556
| label   = Nagano Olympic Stadium
}}
{{clear}} === Location map many, using relief map (image2) === {{Location map many | Japan Nagano Prefecture | relief = yes | width = 200 | caption = Two locations in Nagano Prefecture | lat1_deg = 35.84 | lon1_deg = 137.69 | label1 = Kiso | lat2_deg = 36.64 | lon2_deg = 137.91 | label2 = Azumino }} 
{{Location map many | Japan Nagano
| relief   = yes
| width    = 200
| caption  = Two locations in Nagano Prefecture
| lat1_deg = 35.84
| lon1_deg = 137.69
| label1   = Kiso
| lat2_deg = 36.64
| lon2_deg = 137.91
| label2   = Azumino
}}
{{clear}} }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Japan prefecture location map modules|Nagano]] }}

| lat2_deg = 36.64
| lon2_deg = 137.91
| label2   = Azumino
}}
{{clear}} }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Japan prefecture location map modules|Nagano]] }}
